title: Systems and methods for reducing communication network performance degradation using in-band telemetry data
abstract: A method for reducing communication network performance degradation using in-band telemetry data includes (a) adding in-band telemetry data to one or more data structures flowing through a network element of a communication network, (b) updating a telemetry table according to first telemetry data that is based on the in-band telemetry data, (c) selecting one of a plurality of paths in the communication network at least partially based on data in the telemetry table, and (d) causing a data structure to be routed through the selected one of the plurality of paths in the communication network.
claims: 1. A method for reducing communication network performance degradation using in-band telemetry data in a communication network including a central wireless access point and one or more remote wireless access points, the method comprising: at each of the one or more remote wireless access points, wirelessly receiving one or more Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE) 802.11-based data structures including first content data, adding in-band telemetry data to the one or more IEEE 802.11-based data structures after wirelessly receiving the one or more IEEE 802.11-based data structures such that the one or more IEEE 802.11-based data structures include the first content data and the in-band telemetry data, and wirelessly repeating the one or more IEEE 802.11-based data structures after adding the in-band telemetry data to the one or more IEEE 802.11-based data structures, to support wireless transmission of the one or more IEEE 802.11-based data structures via one or more paths between the central wireless access point and a user equipment (UE) device; updating a telemetry table according to first telemetry data that is based on the in-band telemetry data; selecting one of a plurality of paths in the communication network at least partially based on data in the telemetry table; and causing a data structure to be routed through the selected one of the plurality of paths in the communication network.
